AI builds custom reports across multiple databases.

Dashboards are useful until the real question spans multiple tools. Then the founder asks a developer for another custom report.

Where it removes work

  • Less ad hoc reporting work for developers.
  • Faster answers across systems.
  • Reusable report patterns instead of one-off queries.

What Sysmatic would build

  • Map data sources and safe read access.
  • Create query templates and guardrails.
  • Generate reports with source-linked evidence.
